questions.question: How does the author define faith?
options: The substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen
questions.correct: The substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen
questions.feedback: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.

questions.question: By faith, who offered a more acceptable sacrifice than his brother?
questions.feedback: By faith Abel offered a more acceptable sacrifice than Cain.

questions.question: Without faith it is impossible to please God.
questions.feedback: Without faith it is impossible to please God.

questions.question: By faith Abraham obeyed when called to go to a place he would receive as an inheritance, and he went out not knowing where he was _____.
questions.feedback: Abraham went out not knowing where he was going.

questions.question: Moses chose to be mistreated with God's people rather than enjoy the fleeting pleasures of _____.
questions.feedback: Moses chose mistreatment over the fleeting pleasures of sin.
